name: Attention Issues Assessment
description: Evaluates focus problems, hyperactivity, and impulsivity

questions.text: Do you have trouble concentrating on tasks?
Do you often feel restless or fidgety?
Do you have difficulty sitting still for long periods?
Do you often lose things or forget where you put them?
Do you have trouble following instructions?
Do you act without thinking about consequences?

terminationRules.name: Early Attention Screening
terminationRules.description: Skip remaining questions if no initial attention concerns
